levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: A1 from zero
levels.description: Start speaking English from the first tiny patterns.

levels.title: A1 Core
levels.subtitle: Daily survival English
levels.description: Complete A1 Core with daily situations, simple past and future, polite requests, short messages, and real spoken output.

levels.title: A2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: A1 to A2 transition
levels.description: Bridge from short A1 sentences into connected A2 English: reasons, contrast, time clauses, past stories, plans, polite real-life tasks, and longer spoken answers.

levels.title: A2 Core
levels.subtitle: Strong practical A2
levels.description: A2 Core builds practical control: errands, services, work and study tasks, simple stories, short emails, opinions, listening repair, and one-minute spoken answers.

levels.title: B1 Bridge
levels.subtitle: A2 to B1 bridge
levels.description: Move from simple sentences into connected stories and opinions.

levels.title: B1 Core
levels.subtitle: Balanced B1 English
levels.description: Develop natural conversation, paragraph writing, and real-life output.

levels.title: B2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: B1 to B2 bridge
levels.description: Build abstract thinking, source reactions, and longer spoken answers.

levels.title: B2 Core
levels.subtitle: Confident B2 English
levels.description: Work toward fluent, balanced English for study, work, and real conversation.

lessons.title: I am / You are
lessons.subtitle: Say who you are and how you feel.

lessons.title: He is / She is / It is
lessons.subtitle: Talk about another person or thing.

lessons.title: I like / I need / I want
lessons.subtitle: Say basic feelings and needs.

lessons.title: Simple present: I / you / we / they
lessons.subtitle: Talk about daily actions.

lessons.title: Does questions
lessons.subtitle: Ask about he, she, and it.

lessons.title: Common verbs: go / come / get
lessons.subtitle: Three small verbs for daily life.

lessons.title: Want to / need to
lessons.subtitle: Say what you want or need to do.

lessons.title: Numbers and prices
lessons.subtitle: Say small numbers and simple prices.

lessons.title: Introduce yourself naturally
lessons.subtitle: Give your name, country, and role.

lessons.title: Classroom survival phrases
lessons.subtitle: Ask for repetition, meaning, and help.

lessons.title: Numbers in daily life
lessons.subtitle: Use numbers for tickets, prices, and time.

lessons.title: Phone calls
lessons.subtitle: Start and end a simple call.

lessons.title: Appointments
lessons.subtitle: Make and change a simple appointment.

lessons.title: Apologizing simply
lessons.subtitle: Say sorry and give a short reason.

lessons.title: Talking about hobbies
lessons.subtitle: Say what you do for fun.

lessons.title: Describe a picture
lessons.subtitle: Use there is and present continuous.

lessons.title: Describe your weekend
lessons.subtitle: Talk about simple past and plans.

lessons.title: Give simple opinions
lessons.subtitle: Say what you think and why.

lessons.title: Object pronouns: me / you / him / her
lessons.subtitle: Say who receives the action.

lessons.title: Simple email for a problem
lessons.subtitle: Explain a small problem in writing.

lessons.title: Contrast with but and although
lessons.subtitle: Add a different side to your idea.

lessons.title: Before and after with full sentences
lessons.subtitle: Make time order clearer.

lessons.title: While for two actions
lessons.subtitle: Say two things happen at the same time.

lessons.title: Purpose with to and so that
lessons.subtitle: Say why you do something.

lessons.title: Just for recent actions
lessons.subtitle: Say something happened a moment ago.

lessons.title: Have been to
lessons.subtitle: Talk about places you have visited.

lessons.title: Too and enough
lessons.subtitle: Say more or less than needed.

lessons.title: Directions with landmarks
lessons.subtitle: Use landmarks to find a place.

lessons.title: Apartment search
lessons.subtitle: Ask about a place to live.

lessons.title: Email request
lessons.subtitle: Ask for something clearly by email.

lessons.title: Tell a small problem story
lessons.subtitle: Explain what happened and what you did.

lessons.title: Weekend story with connectors
lessons.subtitle: Tell a weekend story in order.

lessons.title: Past ability with could
lessons.subtitle: Talk about ability in the past.

lessons.title: Summarize a simple article
lessons.subtitle: Say the main idea in one or two sentences.

lessons.title: A2 Bridge final checkpoint
lessons.subtitle: Use connected English in real situations.

lessons.title: Build longer daily answers
lessons.subtitle: Move from one sentence to three.

lessons.title: Explain a small decision
lessons.subtitle: Give a choice and a reason.

lessons.title: Talk about preferences with reasons
lessons.subtitle: Say what you prefer and why.

lessons.title: Make plans with conditions
lessons.subtitle: Use if and when in plans.

lessons.title: Change plans politely
lessons.subtitle: Explain a change without sounding rude.

lessons.title: At the library
lessons.subtitle: Ask about books and study space.

lessons.title: Customer service phone call
lessons.subtitle: Explain a problem on the phone.

lessons.title: Ask for a refund or exchange
lessons.subtitle: Use polite problem-solving language.

lessons.title: Compare products
lessons.subtitle: Choose by price, size, and quality.

lessons.title: Give health advice
lessons.subtitle: Use should, need to, and maybe.

lessons.title: Describe emotions carefully
lessons.subtitle: Use a little, quite, and really.

lessons.title: Explain a mistake
lessons.subtitle: Say what went wrong and what you learned.

lessons.title: Indirect questions
lessons.subtitle: Ask politely with do you know.

lessons.title: Talk about rules at work
lessons.subtitle: Use can, have to, and must.

lessons.title: Offer help naturally
lessons.subtitle: Notice a problem and offer help.

lessons.title: Talk about monthly bills
lessons.subtitle: Use bills, rent, and due dates.

lessons.title: Describe a book simply
lessons.subtitle: Talk about main idea and reaction.

lessons.title: React to news simply
lessons.subtitle: Say what happened and how you feel.

lessons.title: Summarize a short audio
lessons.subtitle: Say the topic and one detail.

lessons.title: Paraphrase a simple idea
lessons.subtitle: Say the same idea another way.

lessons.title: Advantages and disadvantages
lessons.subtitle: Give two sides of a choice.

lessons.title: Give a simple presentation
lessons.subtitle: Open and close a short talk.

lessons.title: A2 Core final checkpoint
lessons.subtitle: Use practical A2 English with control.
